post.description: Save client data, optionally with contacts. Supply 'id' in the post body to update an existing client, otherwise a new one will be created.

contacts.description: When saving a client, either 'name' or 'email' has to be filled. To update an existing contact, also supply 'id' value.

id.description: Contact ID (omit to create new contact)
